headline: Goldman Sachs Raises Price Targets on 3 Tech Giants by 10% and More
summary: Founded in 1869, Goldman Sachs is the world’s second-largest investment bank by revenue and ranks 55th on the Fortune 500 list of the largest U.S. corporations by total revenue. The Wall Street white-glove giant offers financing, advisory services, risk distribution, and hedging for the firm’s institutional and corporate clients. In addition, it provides advice, investing, ... Goldman Sachs Raises Price Targets on 3 Tech Giants by 10% and More

headline: Shares of semiconductor companies are trading lower amid overall market weakness due to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. The industry may be pulling back due to high energy costs that may disrupt the chipmaking process.
summary: Shares of semiconductor companies are trading lower amid overall market weakness due to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. The industry may be pulling back due to high energy costs that may disrupt the chipmaking process.

headline: Analog Devices (ADI) Is Down 6.5% After Margin Plan And AI ATE Tailwind Commentary - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In early March 2026, Analog Devices used its appearance at Morgan Stanley’s Technology, Media & Telecom Conference to outline plans to lift gross margins from 71% to 74% and add 200 basis points to operating margins in fiscal Q2, while highlighting nine straight quarters of above-seasonal performance in ATE, aerospace, and automotive. Management also emphasized that rising AI capital spending could be a meaningful tailwind for its ATE business, suggesting an important link between AI...
